title: Screaming for justice
description: REGIONAL NEWS - A group of women and men...
bodyText: [{"type":"contributor","text":"Marguerite van Ginkel","contributorName":"Marguerite van Ginkel","contributorDate":"Friday, 06 February 2026, 11:00"},{"type":"intro_bold","text":"A collective scream reverberated through the main street, carrying a message on behalf of those across the country whose cries have gone unanswered."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Gallery\n Video","html":"Gallery\n Video"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"REGIONAL NEWS - A group of women and men gathered in Plettenberg Bay on Saturday 31 January for a powerful protest.","html":"REGIONAL NEWS - A group of women and men gathered in Plettenberg Bay on Saturday 31 January for a powerful protest."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A collective scream reverberated through the main street, carrying a message on behalf of those across the country whose cries have gone unanswered. The group screamed for their grief, their loss and their pain.","html":"A collective scream reverberated through the main street, carrying a message on behalf of those across the country whose cries have gone unanswered. The group screamed for their grief, their loss and their pain."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The protest was sparked by the violent murder of their friend, Nicky van Heerden (54), and was organised by Get Nosey. During the protest, a petition was handed to the police calling for the immediate establishment of a public registry of violent offenders.","html":"The protest was sparked by the violent murder of their friend, Nicky van Heerden (54), and was organised by Get Nosey. During the protest, a petition was handed to the police calling for the immediate establishment of a public registry of violent offenders."},{"type":"image_with_caption","text":"Protesters convey their messages. Photo: Marguerite van GinkelVideo: Watch"}]

author: Marguerite van Ginkel
teaser: A collective scream reverberated through the main street, carrying a message on behalf of those across the country whose cries have gone unanswered.
featuredCaption: Men and women stand against violence. Photo: Marguerite van Ginkel
